# logcat — Eliza Voice IME on emulator-5584 (Android 15 / API 35)
# Compile-verification build (ELIZA_ANDROID_SKIP_FORK_LLAMA_LIB=1, no on-device engine/renderer).
# Shows: onStartInputView -> engine-status probe (loopback refused -> ENGINE_OFF state),
#        then the switch-back affordance switching to the previous keyboard.

07-03 20:40:17.218 23779 24205 I ElizaVoiceIme: [ElizaVoiceInputMethodService] engine status unreachable: Failed to connect to /127.0.0.1:31337
07-03 20:40:24.415 23779 23779 I ElizaVoiceIme: [ElizaVoiceInputMethodService] switching back to previous keyboard

## Active IME transitions (adb settings):
before switch-back: ai.elizaos.app/.ElizaVoiceInputMethodService
after  switch-back: com.google.android.inputmethod.latin/com.android.inputmethod.latin.LatinIME
